buildCommand: npm run db:push && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' https: data:; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
